# MapPinned

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::MapPinned;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        MapPinned { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
location, waypoint, marker, drop

## Categories
navigation, travel, account
